name: Easy Karo Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the eggs, corn syrup, sugar, melted margarine, and vanilla until well blended.
2. Stir in the pecans.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
5. Cool.
